text: I feel enveloped by the dimness and silence of this modern, perhaps slightly unsettling environment. The glass and steel suggest a place of utility and formality, yet I am an intruder here, moving through shadows. Upon entering the next room, the colorful wall and glowing screens bring a pulse of curiosity. The oversized 'R+D' hints at innovation, but the nearly poetic text on the screen stirs something more introspective within me. I feel isolated, contemplative—aware of the irony of searching for meaning in spaces meant for productivity. A sense of quiet possibility, tinged with existential wonder, fills me here.
